name: Jakob Lynch
title: Dark Bet

abilities.name: Crazy Eights
abilities.text: Once per activation. When this model flips (not cheats) an 8, it infuses a (c).

abilities.name: Brilliant Guide
abilities.text: Once per activation. After a model within 6" gains a friendly Brilliance token, this model may move it up to 2". Then, this model may remove the Brilliance token to move it an additional 2".

abilities.name: Luck Thief
abilities.text: When performing opposed duels against this model, enemy models treat all (c) as if they were (r).

actions.name: Dark Deal
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action receives a (c) if the target has a friendly Brilliance token.

triggers.name: All In
triggers.text: This model may deal up to 2 irreducible damage to itself. When resolving, deal +1 damage to the target per damage suffered when declaring this trigger.

triggers.name: Cashing Out
triggers.text: Deal 1 damage to enemy models within (melee)1" of the target.

triggers.name: Inner Glow
triggers.text: Allies within 4" of this model heal 1 and may gain a Brilliance token.

triggers.name: What's Due
triggers.text: This model is dealt 1 damage. Summon Hungering Darkness, Eclipse with 3 health anywhere within 2" of the target. It does not gain a Summon token.

triggers.name: The Light Inside
triggers.text: This model or the target gains a Brilliance token.

triggers.name: Consume Brilliance
triggers.text: Remove a friendly Brilliance token from the target. This model heals 2.

actions.name: Looming Eclipse
actions.effects: Remove a friendly Brilliance token from the target. Place this model in base contact with the target.

extraction_notes: Totem information not visible on this card face
